findings.問題: 手刻 underline 連結字:<a href={DS_STORYBOOK_URL} target="_blank" rel="noopener" className="text-info underline"> — 觸發 r3 C20 pattern(連結字應走 Action—Primary canonical text-primary + hover 換色,不用 underline)。無 per-line escape:檔內 @consumer-catalog-allow 覆蓋 r1 catalog、@layout-space-magic-ok 覆蓋 layoutSpace,皆不覆蓋 underline。此檔建立早於 C20 pattern(2026-07-10 批次 A 加入),故 slip past write-time enforcement。實際跑 hook 於此檔 exit 2。

note: Ran actual hook against all consumer .tsx/.ts (App.tsx production exit 0, App.stories exit 0, CompositionFidelityReplica exit 0, main.tsx exit 0, vite.config exit 0, template preview.tsx exit 0).
